steps.title: Calculate surface area of each face
steps.content:
Each side of the box is a square with edge length $52$ cm. The area of one square face is $52 \times 52 = 2704$ square centimeters. Since the box has 5 exterior faces (no lid), multiply by 5: $$2704 \times 5 = 13,520$$ square centimeters.
$$13,520\,\text{cm}^2\div10,000 = 1.352\,\text{m}^2$$ (1 m^2 = 10,000 cm^2).

The answer is 1.352.
